member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Api.Controllers.SyncDefinitionsController
member.summary: API controller for managing sync definitions.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Api.Controllers.SyncDefinitionsController.#ctor(VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Core.Interfaces.ISyncConfigRepository)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.summary: Gets all sync definitions.

member.summary: Gets a sync definition by ID.

member.summary: Creates a new sync definition.

member.summary: Updates an existing sync definition.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Api.Controllers.SyncDefinitionsController.DeleteAsync(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a sync definition by ID.

member.summary: Gets recent sync log entries.
member.param: Number of entries to return (default: 100, max: 1000).

member.summary: Authentication handler that validates API keys from the X-Api-Key header.

member.summary: The authentication scheme name.

member.summary: The HTTP header name for API key.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.IpWhitelistMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that restricts access based on client IP address.
Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.IpWhitelistMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the HTTP request and checks the client IP against the whitelist.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.MustChangePasswordMiddleware
member.summary: Middleware that redirects authenticated users who must change their password to the password change page.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.MustChangePasswordMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.MustChangePasswordMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Processes the HTTP request and redirects if password change is required.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.PasswordHasher
member.summary: Provides PBKDF2-based password hashing and verification.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.PasswordHasher.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a password using PBKDF2 with a random salt.

member.name: M:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.PasswordHasher.VerifyPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a password against a stored hash.
member.returns: true if the password matches; otherwise, false.

member.summary: Security settings for the ReplicaSync web application.

member.summary: Gets or sets the configured API keys.

member.summary: Gets or sets the IP whitelist settings.

member.summary: Gets or sets the account lockout settings.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.SecuritySettings.InitialAdminUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial admin username (for first-run seeding only).

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.SecuritySettings.InitialAdminPassword
member.summary: Gets or sets the initial admin password (for first-run seeding only).

member.summary: Represents an API key entry.

member.summary: Gets or sets the display name for this API key.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.ApiKeyEntry.Key
member.summary: Gets or sets the API key value.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.AccountLockoutSettings
member.summary: Account lockout configuration for brute-force protection.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.AccountLockoutSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether account lockout is enabled.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.AccountLockoutSettings.MaxFailedAttempts
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of consecutive failed login attempts before lockout.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.AccountLockoutSettings.LockoutDurationMinutes
member.summary: Gets or sets the lockout duration in minutes.

member.name: T:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.IpWhitelistSettings
member.summary: IP whitelist configuration.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.IpWhitelistSettings.Enabled
member.summary: Gets or sets whether IP filtering is enabled.

member.name: P:VehicleVision.Pleasanter.ReplicaSync.Web.Security.IpWhitelistSettings.AllowedAddresses
member.summary: Gets or sets the allowed IP addresses or CIDR ranges.
